section1.title: What is an AI-powered website?
section1.p1: An AI-powered website uses artificial intelligence to automate customer communication, personalize content, and improve user experience.
section1.p2: Chatbots, smart search, product recommendations, automatic responses, and content generation - all of this helps reduce workload and increase conversions.
section1.p3: Your site starts working 24/7: answers questions, qualifies leads, and guides users to the right actions.

section2.title: When is AI integration useful?
section2.lead: AI on the site is especially effective for:
items: Lead generation forms with smart validation
section2.footer: AI reduces manual work and speeds up response time - visitors get instant answers.

section3.title: What do you get?
items: AI chatbot tailored to your business
Integration with your CRM and base of knowledge

aiFaq.q: What can an AI chatbot on the site do?
aiFaq.a: It can answer questions from your knowledge base, qualify leads, book appointments, help with product selection, and transfer complex requests to a human operator.

aiFaq.q: Do I need to have a ready-made site?
aiFaq.a: Not necessarily. We can add AI to an existing site or build a new site with AI features from the start.

aiFaq.q: What AI models do you use?
aiFaq.a: We work with OpenAI, Claude, and open models. The choice depends on the task, budget, and data privacy requirements.
From 1–2 weeks for a simple chatbot to 1–2 months for complex systems with personalization and custom logic.
Yes. We configure data handling according to your requirements - you can use your own API keys and keep data on your infrastructure.

aiFaq.q: Can the AI be trained on our products and services?
aiFaq.a: Yes. We integrate the chatbot with your knowledge base, catalog, or CRM so it answers based on your data.

aiFaq.q: How much does AI integration cost?
aiFaq.a: Depends on scope: chatbot type, integrations, and customization. Use the calculator for an estimate.

aiCalculator.title: AI integration cost calculator
aiCalculator.totalNote: Estimated cost. Exact pricing after discussing your project.
